description_long: This is a mesh-back baseball cap featuring a prominent American flag pattern on the front panels, with alternating red and white stripes and a blue field with white stars. The front center of the cap displays a black Hurley logo patch. The brim is solid light blue and appears slightly curved, showing some wear and texture. The back of the cap is constructed from a black mesh material, providing ventilation, and includes an adjustable plastic snapback closure for size adjustment. The overall structure is soft and flexible, typical of casual baseball caps, and the stitching is visible along the seams and brim. The cap is designed for everyday wear and combines patriotic styling with practical comfort.
description: A mesh-back baseball cap with an American flag pattern on the front, a light blue curved brim, and a black Hurley logo patch. The back features black mesh and an adjustable snapback closure.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black mesh back and adjustable plastic snapback closure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mesh back, the American flag pattern on the front panel, and the curved blue brim.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full American flag pattern, the Hurley logo patch, and the light blue brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mesh back, flag pattern, and the side profile of the brim.
